sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Energy Transfer stands out as a high-yield dividend stock | ET
feed.summary: Energy Transfer LP (ET) is presented as a compelling high-yield dividend stock, offering a 7% yield in 2026, backed by record $16 billion adjusted EBITDA for 2025 and approximately 90% fee-based revenue. The company plans significant growth capital spending of $5 billion to $5.5 billion in 2026, targeting 3% to 5% annual distribution growth through major pipeline projects and deals with data centers and power plants. Analysts largely recommend "buy" for ET, citing its strong financial performance, stable cash flows, and clear growth trajectory.

feed.title: News | Brookfield buys Madrid multifamily portfolio from Blackstone for €1.2 billion
feed.summary: Brookfield Asset Management has acquired Blackstone's entire Fidere residential portfolio in Spain for €1.2 billion. This transaction represents the largest multifamily deal in Spain since the great financial crisis and is the first real estate trade exceeding €1 billion since the recent Iran war began. The news is exclusively available to CoStar subscribers.

feed.title: Costco’s Manitoba Business Centre Opens New Chapter In Business Growth
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale has opened its eleventh Business Centre in Canada, located in Manitoba, converting an existing warehouse to cater to businesses like restaurants and offices. This new center offers expanded delivery services and business-focused inventory, aiming to deepen ties with commercial buyers and efficiently utilize existing real estate. The expansion highlights Costco's strategy to grow its business-to-business offerings, creating a specialized channel that complements its traditional consumer warehouse model while presenting both opportunities and risks for investors.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Texas Instruments (TXN) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) has experienced a recent share price pullback, declining 12.1% over the last 30 days, prompting a reassessment of its valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 14.1% overvalued at its current price of US$186.42. However, based on its P/E ratio of 34.13x, which is close to Simply Wall St’s Fair Ratio of 34.23x, the stock appears to be priced at a fair level. The article also presents opposing bull and bear case narratives for TXN, highlighting different perspectives on its future value drivers.

feed.title: Panic erupts after Delta plane engine bursts into flames shortly after takeoff
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines flight departing from Sao Paulo, Brazil, experienced an engine fire shortly after takeoff, causing panic among the 272 passengers and 14 crew members on board. The aircraft, which had flames visible from its left engine, returned to the airport and landed safely about 10 minutes later. Delta stated the issue was mechanical, and no injuries were reported.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. Reports Massive Revenue Growth
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp., a Nasdaq-listed blockchain technology company, reported a massive 442% increase in revenue for its fiscal year 2025. This growth is attributed to the surging demand for its innovative decentralized finance (DeFi) solutions, including a lending platform, automated market maker, and NFT marketplace. The company's success highlights the transformative potential of blockchain technology in the financial industry.

feed.title: \u2018Turn around\u2019: Passenger records from Delta flight while engine sparks after takeoff
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines flight from S\u00e3o Paulo, Brazil, to Atlanta was forced to return to its origin airport shortly after takeoff due to a mechanical issue with its left engine. A passenger captured video inside the aircraft showing the engine sparking, and passengers could be heard yelling "Turn around." Delta confirmed the plane landed safely and apologized to customers for the delay, stating that the safety of passengers and crew is their highest priority.

feed.title: Oracle and NetSuite Deliver New AI-Powered Solution for Restaurant Operations
feed.summary: Oracle and NetSuite have introduced an AI-powered solution called Oracle NetSuite Restaurant Operations, designed to improve efficiency and profitability for restaurants by unifying critical back-office functions. This new offering centralizes inventory, procurement, scheduling, production, and cash management data for real-time visibility and enhanced decision-making. The solution leverages over 25 years of hospitality expertise and embedded AI to automate tasks and streamline operations for various restaurant sizes, integrating with Oracle Simphony Cloud and other POS systems.

feed.title: Aumenta la luz: aprobaron los nuevos cuadros tarifarios que regirán a partir de abril
feed.summary: Argentina's National Electricity Regulatory Entity (ENRE) approved new electricity tariff schedules for Edenor and Edesur, set to begin April 1st, 2026. These increases will apply to residential users with and without subsidies, as well as to neighborhood clubs and public welfare entities. This follows a recent hike in gas tariffs for the AMBA region, with the government aiming to adjust rates to the economic context and current energy subsidy programs.

feed.title: What stores are open on 2026 Easter Sunday? More from Target, Walmart, Starbucks
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive list of stores expected to be open and closed on Easter Sunday 2026. Major retailers like Walmart and Kroger are likely to be open, while Target and Costco are anticipated to be closed. Shoppers are advised to plan ahead and call local stores to confirm specific holiday hours.

feed.title: Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd. Announces Reinsurance Transaction with Japan Post Insurance Company
feed.summary: Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd. has entered into a coinsurance agreement with Japan Post Insurance Co., Ltd. to reinsure a block of whole life annuities, effective March 31, 2026. This marks Aflac Re's first external reinsurance transaction and aims to strengthen the strategic partnership with Japan Post Insurance. The collaboration seeks to create shared value for policyholders and shareholders while leveraging Aflac Re's expertise to support Japanese life insurers in risk reduction and capital management.

feed.title: UK Royal Navy Awards Teledyne Contract for Underwater Gliders
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has secured a contract from the UK Ministry of Defence to supply the Royal Navy with autonomous ocean observing systems, including gliders and floats, for its Future Maritime Data Gathering (FMDG) program. This agreement enhances the Royal Navy's ability to collect high-quality environmental data in complex and remote maritime environments, supporting operational planning and defence activities. The contract reinforces the Royal Navy's long-standing use of Teledyne's unmanned systems, essential for understanding the underwater battlespace and maintaining an information advantage.
